channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Grass under bungalows windows not cut, 15th April
item.description:
The grass area under croxley green bungalow windows has been left uncut. This is still part of LBB land.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 30, Croxley Green, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: On the green areas and by the bins outside 1B, 15th April
item.description:
Someone has dumped a TV and a basket on the green area some black smelly bags outside of the bins

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Harvist Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: Decaying rat on the pavement, 15th April
item.description:
There is a decaying (poisoned?) rat on the pavement outside no. 15 Groombridge Road. It has been there for two or three days and maggots are starting to develop

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Groombridge Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Constant Flytipping, 15th April
item.description:
We experience consistent dumping of house hold rubbish outside our block. It is not possible that this is the residents of Pendas Mead only as the volume of dumping is excessive. our street is quiet & has no cameras, so is a known location for fly tipping.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Pendas Mead, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car not been used for long time, 15th April
item.description:
Car parked on public road for long time no MOT. Not driven for long time.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Morston Gardens, Elmstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Constant litter and fly tipping on the east end of Clifden Road E5 rubbish piled up there., 15th April
item.description:
Constant litter and fly tipping on the east end of Clifden Road E5 rubbish piled up there.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Median Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Supermarket trolley and an old chair thrown in the canal, 15th April
item.description:
As above by the bridge

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Wentworth Gardens, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 2 large empty (?) nitrous oxide cylinders in a box outside my house, 15th April
item.description:
2 nitrous oxide cylinders were put outside my house 82 Lakedale Rd, so to stop them rolling around further I put them in a small box. Cant put in bin due to hazard of exploding at waste transfer station risking injury to staff and damage to machinery. No idea who is responsible but regularly notice them in gutter or outside houses. Please collect for responsible disposal, thank you.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lakedale Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Parked car not driven for long time., 15th April
item.description:
Car no MOT parked on public street not be driven for long time.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Morston Gardens, Elmstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: I have found that someone has fly-tipped a used gas cooker outside my property. It does not belong to me., 15th April
item.description:
Hello, Today I have found that someone has fly-tipped a used gas cooker outside my property. It does not belong to me. My address is 55 Plough Way SE16 2LS.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 57, Plough Way, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Single Mattress, black sacks carboards tree cutting suitcases and shopping trolley full off carpet off cuts., 15th April
item.description:
Single Mattress, black sacks carboards tree cutting suitcases and shopping trolley full off carpet off cuts
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Reddy Road, Slade Green, Greater London

Bed headboard & chest of drawers on pavement

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Abery Street, Plumstead

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Firs Farm Wetland Walk, Edmonton, Greater London

item.title: Discarded (Large) Gas Cannister (roughly 30cm tall), 15th April
item.description:
Discarded gas cannister has been removed from the street, and is available for safe disposal and collection.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kingsway, Poverest, Greater London

item.title: Fly tipping - outside of 107-109 Erith high street, 15th April
item.description:
Fly tipping of used nappies, bottles and general rubbish. This is a regular occurrence.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bexley Road, Slade Green, Greater London

item.title: 31 Bloomsbury Way, 15th April
item.description:
Barriers obstructing the use of a a fire hydrant, causing a major issue
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 33, Bloomsbury Way, Bloomsbury, Greater London

item.title: Abandoned car, 15th April
item.description:
It hasn't moved and has been there for at least 2 months

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mortimer Road, Northumberland Heath, Greater London

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Purrett Road, Plumstead

item.title: Request for tree in Bruce Close o/s no. 70 to be cut down, 15th April
item.description:
Request for tree in Bruce Close o/s no. 70 to be cut down - it is overgrown, leaves scatter everywhere and would like it completely cut down as becoming a nuisance...
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bruce Close, East Wickham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 15th April
item.description:
